duplicateFileError: That PDF is already in the merge queue.
emptyQueueDescription: Add at least two PDF files, then arrange the final page order.
emptyResultDescription: The merged file will appear here after the queue is ready.
encryptedPdfError: Encrypted PDFs cannot be merged here. Remove the owner password first.
invalidPdfError: One or more files are not valid PDFs.
localOnlyNote: Files stay in this browser session. Nothing is uploaded.
mergeFailedError: The PDFs could not be merged. Check the files and try again.
noFilesError: Add at least two valid PDF files before merging.
outputFileDescription: The .pdf extension is added automatically when needed.
queueDescription: Drag PDFs or use the arrow buttons to control the merge order.
resultDescription: Download the combined PDF after merging.
uploadDescription: Drop multiple PDFs or choose files from your device.
workerUnavailableError: This browser cannot run the background PDF worker.
